en: If your company is required to obtain a China Work-Related Injury Insurance Participation Certificate, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form.
China Work-Related Injury Insurance Participation Certificate Applicability Assessment

The China Work-Related Injury Insurance Participation Certificate is an official document issued by the local Social Insurance Bureau confirming that an employer is enrolled in the Work-Related Injury Insurance program and has made the required premium contributions. It serves as formal proof that the employer is fulfilling its legal obligation to provide work injury coverage for employees under China’s social insurance system.

Work-Related Injury Insurance Participation Certificate Acquisition Process:

1.Enrollment Employers must register with their local Social Insurance Bureau by submitting the appropriate materials such as Business license, employee labor contracts, payroll records. The Bureau verifies compliance and confirms that insurance premiums have been paid.

2.Certificate Issuance Once verified, the certificate can be obtained online through the National Social Insurance Public Service Platform or local equivalents, or in person at the local bureau.

Note: Requirements may vary by region. Suppliers should consult their local bureau for specific guidance.
